zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Longespee 2 wife於大約1225年出生時，她的父親William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury50歲，母親Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury40歲。她和Roger de Clifford至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1277年之後在英國英格蘭賀福爾海伊。

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Longespee 2 wife was born about 1225, her father, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, was 50 and her mother, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, was 40. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Roger de Clifford. She died after 1277, in Hay, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Longespee 2 wife est née environ 1225, son père, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, avait 40 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Roger de Clifford. Elle est décédée après 1277, à Hay, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Longespee 2 wife um 1225 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury 50 und ihre Mutter Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury 40. Sie hatte mit Roger de Clifford mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1277 in Hay, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Longespee 2 wife è nata il circa 1225, sua padre, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, aveva 40 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Roger de Clifford. Morì dopo il 1277, nel Hay, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Longespee 2 wifeが約1225年に生まれた時，父William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisburyは50歳，母Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisburyは40歳であった。彼女はRoger de Cliffordとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1277年以後にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアヘイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Longespee 2 wife(이)가 대략 1225년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 Roger de Clifford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1277년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 헤이에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Longespee 2 wife родилась около 1225 г., её отцу по имени William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, 40. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Roger de Clifford. Она умерла после 1277 г. в местности хеи, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
